title: Two anchors: F and J
description: Your two anchor keys — F (left index) and J (right index). Feel the bumps!
text: f f f j j j fj fj jf jf ff jj fj jf ff jj
finger_focus: Index fingers find F and J anchors

tips.text: F is your LEFT anchor, J is your RIGHT anchor — feel the little bumps!

tips.target: f f f j j j fj fj

tips.text: Two homes, one for each hand

character_tips.anna: F and J have little bumps — find them with your eyes closed 🌸

character_tips.knopych: BUMPS FOUND! 🎯 F and J — your two homes!
